meta.title: Portable Office Containers — 20ft & 40ft | Crystal Group
meta.description: Pre-fitted portable office containers with electrical wiring, LED lighting, and HVAC. Custom layouts for construction sites, events, and field operations.

hero.name: Portable Office Containers
hero.tagline: Ready-to-use workspace delivered to your site. Pre-fitted with electrics, LED lighting, and HVAC — operational the same day.

overview: Crystal Group's portable office containers deliver fully fitted workspaces to any site. Each unit comes pre-wired with electrical fittings, LED lighting, and HVAC — operational within hours of delivery. Available in standard pre-designed models or fully custom interiors. Ideal for construction companies, event organisers, educational institutions, and remote operations.

features.title: Ready to Use
features.desc: Pre-fitted electrical wiring, LED lighting, and HVAC. Operational within hours of delivery — connect to site power and start.

features.title: Fully Custom
features.desc: Choose from standard models or specify your layout — partitions, furniture, flooring, paint colours, and branded exteriors.

features.title: Fully Mobile
features.desc: Relocate via forklift or crane as the project moves. No civil foundations or permanent work required.

features.title: Secure & Weatherproof
features.desc: Weatherproof Corten steel construction with high-quality locks and reinforced walls for site security.

faq.a: Standard units include electrical wiring, LED lighting, and HVAC. Plumbing connections can be added on request.

faq.q: How quickly is a unit operational?
faq.a: Units are ready within a few hours of delivery — connect to your site's power supply and you're set.
Yes. Choose from standard layouts or request custom partitions, furniture, flooring, paint colours, and branding.

faq.q: How do you move the container when the project site changes?
faq.a: Our team handles relocation via forklift or crane. We cover pan-India.

faq.q: Is rental available or only purchase?
faq.a: Both. We offer flexible short-term and long-term rental alongside outright purchase options.
